title: Vu nhom doi tuong su dung ma tuy o Cat Ba: Cong an lam viec voi ca si Miu Le
topic: nghe si lien quan ma tuy
content: CafeF dan nguon Bao Nguoi Lao Dong cho biet Cong an TP Hai Phong lam viec voi ca si Miu Le lien quan den mot nhom doi tuong su dung trai phep chat ma tuy tai khu vuc bai tam Tung Thu, Cat Ba. Theo thong tin ban dau trong bai, Cong an dac khu Cat Hai nhan tin bao, kiem tra va moi cac doi tuong ve tru so de xac minh. Vu viec dang duoc tiep tuc dieu tra, lam ro.

metadata.legal_status: cong an lam viec, xac minh
